lemma: (the Unicode normalized entry in Ancient Greek alphabet with diacritics and other characters if needed, like progressive numbers for homographs or hyphens for truncated forms; format: string; type: mandatory; see examples below)
derivation: (the Unicode normalized word formation data for the entry, in Ancient Greek alphabet with diacritics and other characters if needed; format: string; type: non mandatory, leave empty if null; see examples below)
lemma_raw: (the Unicode normalized entry in Ancient Greek alphabet with diacritics, stripped of any non-Ancient Greek or spurious characters; format: string; type: mandatory; see examples below)
lemma_betacode: (the value of the previous column converted in betacode with diacritics; format: string; type: mandatory; see examples below)
lemma_betacode_raw: (the betacode version of the entry without diacritics; format: string; stype: mandatory; ee examples below)
derivation_raw: (the entry's derivation split into singke constituents and stripped of any non-Ancient Greek or spurious characters; format: list of strings; type: non mandatory, leave empty list if null; see examples below)
derivation_betacode: (the value of the previous column converted in betacode without diacritics; format: list of strings; type: non mandatory, leave empty list if null; see examples below)
prefix: (the Unicode normalized prefix(es) of the entry in Ancient Greek alphabet with diacritics; format: list of strings; type: non mandatory, leave empty list if null; see examples below)
prefix_betacode: (the value of the previous column converted in betacode without diacritics; format: list of strings; type: non mandatory, leave empty list if null; see examples below)
query_lemmas: (the values of the column 'lemma_raw' and 'lemma_betacode_raw' joined by '/'; format: string; type: non mandatory, leave empty if null; see examples below)
meaning: (the top level meaning(s) of the entry; format: string;  type: non mandatory, leave empty if null; see examples below)
url: (the Url to the correspondig entry on the Perseus website; format: string;  type: non mandatory, leave empty if null; see examples below)
part_of_speech: (the part of speech tag of the entry; format: string;  type: non mandatory, leave empty if null; see examples below)
suffix: (the Unicode normalized suffix of the entry in Ancient Greek alphabet with diacritics; format: list of strings; type: non mandatory, leave empty list if null; see examples below)
suffix_betacode: (the value of the previous column converted in betacode without diacritics; format: list of strings; type: non mandatory, leave empty list if null; see examples below)
